name: Database schema & local migrations
description: Design the initial D1 schema and migration workflow for users, households, memberships, expenses, categories, groups, budgets, sessions, and audit records, including local seed support for development and tests.
evidence: Replaced legacy apps/worker D1 baseline with household-finance schema; worker tests passed (47/47), local Wrangler migrate + seed succeeded, and ./init.sh passed on 2026-04-22.
